loadImagesFailed: Failed to load task images; try again or click Refresh.
stopTaskConfirm: Stop this task? Downloaded images will be kept; pending items will be cancelled.
deleteTaskConfirmRunning: Task is running; it will be stopped first. Continue?
stopFailedCancel: Failed to stop task; delete cancelled
noTasksToClear: No tasks to clear (all tasks are pending or running)
clearAllTasksConfirmPreserved: Delete all completed/failed/cancelled tasks? {count} tasks ({pending} pending and {running} running will be kept).
